description_long: This is a white athletic shoe with a low-cut profile, featuring a prominent pink logo on the side and the brand name 'DIADORA' printed in pink on the opposite side. The upper is constructed from synthetic material with subtle texturing and paneling for breathability and support. The shoe has a standard criss-cross lacing system with white laces and reinforced eyelets. The midsole is thick and contoured, with visible cushioning elements and a sculpted heel for shock absorption. The outsole is gray with a patterned tread for traction, and there are small accents of pink and green near the heel. The overall design is sleek and modern, suitable for sports or casual urban wear.
description: A white low-cut athletic shoe with pink branding, gray treaded sole, and standard lacing, designed for comfort and performance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rounded toe, white laces in a criss-cross pattern, and textured upper.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the large pink logo, sculpted midsole, and subtle green accent near the heel.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the heel structure, back paneling, and the way the laces are tied at the back.
description_view_3: Right side view features the 'DIADORA' brand name in pink and the layered construction of the upper.
attribute_logo: Large pink stylized logo on the left side, 'DIADORA' text in pink on the right side
